title: A2Z 4 Kids Catapult Aircraft Gun Set Free Flight Foam Glider Launcher Toy for Kids Boys Girls Age 3+ | 2 in 1 Ejection Throwing Gun with 2 Large 34CM Foam Planes Indoor Outdoor Fun
features: SAFE & DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from premium lightweight foam and sturdy plastic this catapult aircraft gun ensures safe play indoors and outdoors. The soft foam planes are gentle on hands and furniture minimising damage risk while providing endless fun for young kids aged 3 and above. Rounded edges and child-friendly materials make it ideal for worry-free family playtime every day.

2 IN 1 LAUNCH & THROW DESIGN: This exciting set comes with a large 25CM catapult launcher gun and two colourful 34CM foam planes that can be easily ejected or thrown by hand. Children can choose their favourite launch style for versatile fun. The easy-to-use trigger mechanism lets kids load aim and fire in seconds developing hand-eye coordination and motor skills through active play.

PERFECT FOR EDUCATIONAL PLAY: Encourage STEM learning and imagination as children explore flight physics and aerodynamics with every launch. Kids experiment with angles and force enhancing problem-solving and creative thinking. Great for solo adventures or friendly competitions with siblings and friends promoting teamwork and interactive play indoors and outside.

PORTABLE & EASY TO ASSEMBLE: The lightweight design makes this aircraft gun set easy to take to the park garden or playground. Assembly is simple and quick just slot the foam wings into place and clip the plane onto the launcher. Compact enough to store in backpacks for trips and holidays it keeps kids entertained and active wherever they go rain or shine.

PERFECT GIFT FOR BOYS & GIRLS: Bring excitement to birthdays parties or festive occasions with this engaging outdoor toy for children. Designed to deliver safe energetic fun while helping kids stay active and away from screens. A fantastic alternative to digital gadgets this foam aircraft launcher sparks laughter and adventure building precious memories with friends and family.
